About Me

I'm an undergraduate student at IIT Bombay studying Environmental Science and Engineering. Alongside my academics, I enjoy building web applications and learning modern frontend technologies. I like creating interfaces that are clean, intuitive, and enjoyable to use while continuously improving my development skills through personal projects.
